message:
refactor(fp-io): dry up primary_key_columns via primary_keys_from_schema (br-oghl / fd90.47)

Self-review of fd90.43 surfaced a code-quality defect: the
filter+sort logic for deriving PK columns from a SqlTableSchema
existed in two places — the SqlConnection::primary_key_columns
trait default impl (fd90.25) inlined it, and the new
primary_keys_from_schema free-fn helper (fd90.43, used by
SqlInspector::reflect_table) duplicated it.

Refactor: the trait default impl now delegates to
primary_keys_from_schema(&meta) after the table_schema fetch.
Single source of truth for the column-by-ordinal derivation; the
helper's doc comment updated to call out its canonical role.

Pure cleanup — no behavior change. 414 fp-io tests pass; clippy
-D warnings clean across fp-io + umbrella; ubs Critical=0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
